'''âsh-d-d''' ('''kashadad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poleax|poleax]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poleax|poleax]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-d-d
|-
! Lemma
| kashadad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadad|thishadad]] || [[word:jishadad|jishadad]] || [[word:shishadad|shishadad]] || [[word:kishadad|kishadad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushadad|thuthushadad]] || [[word:jujushadad|jujushadad]] || [[word:shushushadad|shushushadad]] || [[word:kukushadad|kukushadad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushadad|thushadad]] || [[word:jushadad|jushadad]] || [[word:shushadad|shushadad]] || [[word:kushadad|kushadad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushadad|thushadad]] || [[word:jushadad|jushadad]] || [[word:shushadad|shushadad]] || [[word:kushadad|kushadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshadad|theshadad]] || [[word:jeshadad|jeshadad]] || [[word:sheshadad|sheshadad]] || [[word:keshadad|keshadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshadad|thothoshadad]] || [[word:jojoshadad|jojoshadad]] || [[word:shoshoshadad|shoshoshadad]] || [[word:kokoshadad|kokoshadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshadad|thoshadad]] || [[word:joshadad|joshadad]] || [[word:shoshadad|shoshadad]] || [[word:koshadad|koshadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshadad|thoshadad]] || [[word:joshadad|joshadad]] || [[word:shoshadad|shoshadad]] || [[word:koshadad|koshadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshadad|thĂŠshadad]] || [[word:jĂŠshadad|jĂŠshadad]] || [[word:shĂŠshadad|shĂŠshadad]] || [[word:kĂŠshadad|kĂŠshadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashadad|thathashadad]] || [[word:jajashadad|jajashadad]] || [[word:shashashadad|shashashadad]] || [[word:kakashadad|kakashadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashadad|thashadad]] || [[word:jashadad|jashadad]] || [[word:shashadad|shashadad]] || [[word:kashadad|kashadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashadad|thashadad]] || [[word:jashadad|jashadad]] || [[word:shashadad|shashadad]] || [[word:kashadad|kashadad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashadad|shashadad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashadad|goshashadad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashadad|gokishashadad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashadadnĂŒ|shashadadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashadadnknĂŒ|goshashadadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadadnĂŒ|gokishashadadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashadadshĂ«|shashadadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashadadnkshĂ«|goshashadadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashadadshĂ«|gokishashadadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadadro|shashadadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadadnkro|goshashadadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadadro|gokishashadadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadadmu|shashadadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadadnkmu|goshashadadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadadmu|gokishashadadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashadadsher|shashadadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashadadnksher|goshashadadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashadadsher|gokishashadadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashadadng|shashadadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashadadnkng|goshashadadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashadadng|gokishashadadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashadadya|shashadadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashadadnkya|goshashadadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashadadya|gokishashadadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashadadyam|shashadadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashadadnkyam|goshashadadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashadadyam|gokishashadadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadadnĂŒshĂ«|shashadadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashadadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashadadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadadnĂŒro|shashadadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadadnknĂŒro|goshashadadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadadnĂŒro|gokishashadadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadadnĂŒmu|shashadadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadadnknĂŒmu|goshashadadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadadnĂŒmu|gokishashadadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadadshĂ«nĂŒ|shashadadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashadadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashadadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadadshĂ«ro|shashadadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadadnkshĂ«ro|goshashadadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadadshĂ«ro|gokishashadadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadadshĂ«mu|shashadadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadadnkshĂ«mu|goshashadadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadadshĂ«mu|gokishashadadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadadronĂŒ|shashadadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadadnkronĂŒ|goshashadadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadadronĂŒ|gokishashadadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadadroshĂ«|shashadadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadadnkroshĂ«|goshashadadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadadroshĂ«|gokishashadadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadadromu|shashadadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadadnkromu|goshashadadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadadromu|gokishashadadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadadmunĂŒ|shashadadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadadnkmunĂŒ|goshashadadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadadmunĂŒ|gokishashadadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadadmushĂ«|shashadadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadadnkmushĂ«|goshashadadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadadmushĂ«|gokishashadadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadadmuro|shashadadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadadnkmuro|goshashadadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadadmuro|gokishashadadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
